fullText:
😍 SANDALS ROYAL CURACAO MEGA DEAL 😍

😱 7 NIGHTS FOR UNDER £4500 PER COUPLE 😱 

Where Amazing Comes Together

Nestled in the heart of the Leeward Antilles, on the coast of a tiny, beautiful island where natural and cultural wonders connect to create a beautiful mélange unseen anywhere else. Here is where the natural romance of our intimate island comes alive. You’ll see it in the line where the desert landscape gently slopes into the azure ocean. Waters that invite you to dive in and explore what’s beneath.

You’ll experience it in the way the expansive pool extends into the endless Spanish Water, encouraging you to imagine forever. In the place where Tafelberg Mountain meets the horizon, inspiring peaks that beckon you to climb to new heights and absorb stunning sunsets. And how the wind catches a sail, propelling adventures yet to come. You’ll taste it in the quintessential flavors of Dutch, Caribbean, Latin and Creole cuisine, simmered low and slow, melding into a stobá stew. And hear it when you learn to say “I love you” in four different languages, with a true sense of warmth only Sandals can teach you. You’ll put it all into the memories you’ll create, with the person you love, here at Sandals Royal Curaçao. We invite you to see, taste, smell, hear, and feel it for yourself.

🐟 🌊 SANDALS ROYAL BAHAMIAN 🌊 🐟 

Welcome to a place that moves at a dreamer's pace

Settled on the serene coast of Nassau there’s a place that moves at a dreamer’s pace and can be reached in the span of a daydream. Where the ocean lilts a warm welcome, the gentle breezes embrace you, and love comes easy. It’s the Bahamian way of life. One that washes over you from the moment you dip your toes in the clear blue waters that leisurely lap our sugar white shores. Easy going isn’t just how we are. It’s who we are. And it’s the spirit that imbues every corner of Sandals Royal Bahamian.

Lounge under the generous shade of the palms at the all-new Coconut Grove. You can relax during the day and join the party at night with live music and entertainment to keep the easy-going feeling. Dine at any of our three new food trucks and enjoy the traditional flavors of the island, Italian classics, or grab a sweet treat and coffee.

A global team of master chefs cater to your culinary cravings at 10 specialty restaurants and three amazing new food trucks, each boasting its own authentic ambiance and décor. From toes-in-the-sand meals to the clinking of glasses in the evening, the moments spent sharing a meal together are the moments to remember.

The adults-orientated Royalton Vessence Barbados is on the doorstep of one of the island’s famous scoops of white sand, with a side of gourmet dining.

This place is seriously easy on the eye, blending modern design with tropical scenery. Manicured gardens are dotted with wooden pergolas and palms, while the pool terrace serves up chilled drinks with front-row ocean views.

Set along Barbados’ Gold Coast, the beach here is all soft, dove-white sand – and it’s lined with loungers and parasols to embrace the chill island life. Snorkelling, sea kayaking, and watersports add an adventurous streak to laidback days in the sun, too.

✨🇯🇲 IMPORTANT UPDATE – SANDALS JAMAICA RESORTS 🇯🇲 ✨ 

We wanted to share an important update for anyone travelling to selected Sandals resorts in Jamaica during 2026.

Following redevelopment plans after last year’s hurricane, the reopening dates for the below resorts have been updated:

✨ Sandals South Coast – 18th November 2026
✨ Sandals Montego Bay – 18th December 2026
✨ Sandals Royal Caribbean – 18th December 2026

These resorts are undergoing a major transformation, with a completely reimagined Sandals experience planned — including upgraded rooms, dining, pools and more.

💬 WHAT THIS MEANS FOR YOU
If you are due to travel before these new reopening dates, your booking will be affected — but don’t worry, we are already working through all bookings and have already been in touch directly.

There are a range of flexible options available, including:
✔️ Moving to another Sandals resort in Jamaica
✔️ Changing your travel dates
✔️ Switching destination
✔️ Or cancelling free of charge

We’re currently working closely with Sandals for clients in departure date order, but as per the email sent, if you have a preference, feel free to drop us a response so we can action as soon as your travel dates are in process. 

✈️ As always, we’re here to make this as smooth as possible and ensure you still have an incredible holiday to look forward to.

Guru Travel Team 💜

At Shamwari the whole family can:

🌟 Explore the wild on guided game drives and spot elephants, lions and rhinos in their natural home 🌿 
￼
🏃‍♂️ Run wild at the Kids on Safari Adventure Centre with ziplines, climbing walls, treehouses and slides 🌳 ￼

It’s more than a holiday — it’s a life-long memory in the making. 🌞🦓✨

fullText:
✈️MORE DIRECT FLIGHTS MORE INCREDIBLE ESCAPES🌍

If you’ve been thinking about a winter getaway… this might be your sign 👀

British Airways are adding more long-haul routes and extra availability this winter, making it even easier to reach some of our favourite destinations without the hassle of stopovers.

From tropical beaches to bucket-list adventures, there are now even more options to get you there smoothly and in style.

⸻

📍 Sri Lanka (Colombo) – back on the map with 3 flights a week from October

📍 Barbados – now even easier with daily Gatwick flights (plus connections to Grenada, Tobago & Guyana)

📍 Cape Town – increased to 3 flights a day from Heathrow

📍 Saint Lucia – daily direct flights now running as a dedicated service

📍 Tokyo (Haneda) – increasing to twice daily from London

📍 Costa Rica – now 5 flights a week from Heathrow

📍 Jamaica (Kingston) – 4 flights a week from Gatwick

📍 Dominican Republic (Punta Cana) – also up to 4 flights weekly

⸻

Whether you’re dreaming of Caribbean sunshine, an African safari, or something a little different like Japan or Sri Lanka, getting there has just become a whole lot easier.

💬 If you’ve got somewhere in mind, drop us a message — we’ll build it around you.
